title: Machu Picchu Full Day
summary: Panoramic Vistadome train, entrance, bus to the citadel, and certified bilingual guide.
description: Visit the wonder of the world in a single day from Cusco. Early departure to Ollantaytambo to board the Vistadome train with panoramic views, arrival at Aguas Calientes and a bus up to the Inca citadel. 2-hour guided tour with a certified expert, free time for photos, and return to Cusco at the end of the day.
highlights: Entrance to the Machu Picchu citadel
Hotel pick-up and drop-off in Cusco

title: Humantay Lake
summary: Turquoise lake at 4,200 m / 13,780 ft. Breakfast, lunch, and optional horseback ride with a local muleteer.
description: About a two-hour hike from Soraypampa to the stunning turquoise waters of Humantay Lake, at the foot of the snow-capped peak of the same name. Includes Andean breakfast, buffet lunch on the way back, bilingual guide, and the option to ride up with a local muleteer.
highlights: Guided hike up to the lake
Optional horseback ride with a muleteer
Hotel pick-up and drop-off in Cusco

title: Rainbow Mountain
summary: Hike to Vinicunca (Rainbow Mountain). Includes breakfast, lunch, and an expert local guide.
description: Vinicunca, the Rainbow Mountain, is one of the most striking landscapes in the Peruvian Andes. Early morning departure to Cusipata, breakfast en route, and a 1.5-hour hike to the viewpoint at 5,036 m / 16,521 ft. Free time for photos and return with lunch included.
highlights: Guided hike to the Vinicunca viewpoint

title: Sacred Valley VIP
summary: Pisac, Ollantaytambo, Chinchero, and the Maras salt mines. Buffet lunch included.
description: Full-day tour of the Sacred Valley of the Incas with small groups and a bilingual guide. Visit Pisac market and ruins, enjoy a buffet lunch in Urubamba, explore the Inca fortress of Ollantaytambo, the traditional weavers of Chinchero, and the pre-Hispanic salt mines of Maras.

title: Maras & Moray ATV Tour
summary: Ride past the circular terraces of Moray and the Maras salt mines on a quad bike.
description: ATV adventure across the Chinchero plains, the concentric terraces of Moray, and the salt mines of Maras. Safety briefing, full gear, and an experienced guide-instructor. Suitable for riders with basic or advanced experience.

title: Best of Peru 10D / 9N
summary: Lima, Paracas, Nazca, Cusco, Sacred Valley, Machu Picchu, Vinicunca, and Humantay.
description: Ten days across Peru's must-see destinations. Tour historic Lima, the Ballestas Islands in Paracas, a flight over the Nazca Lines, the Sacred Valley, Machu Picchu by Vistadome train, Rainbow Mountain, and Humantay Lake. Hand-picked hotels, private transport, and local guides at every destination.
